reviews.comment:
Es la segunda vez que voy hace más de 3 meses y Siguen sin tener o aceptar tarjetas siendo que se trata de un acá y tampoco funciona correctamente para cargar los puntos de serviclub siendo que sólo me cargaron la mitad del monto correspondiente por supuestos problemas técnicos

(Translated by Google)
This is the second time I've been here in over 3 months, and they still don't have or accept cards, even though it's a branch. Also, the Serviclub points system isn't working properly; they only credited me half the amount due to supposed technical problems.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3dnVmZ2ZBEAE

reviews.comment:
Acorde a las Nececidades!! No confiarse a que haya nafta!!! Suele faltar...
Si te gusta parar a tomar un mate, ese no es el lugar no anda la maquina de agua hace mucho y los del shop no te calientan agua...

(Translated by Google)
According to needs! Don't rely on gas! There's often a shortage...
If you'd like to stop for a mate, this isn't the place. The water machine hasn't been working for a long time, and the people at the shop won't heat water for you...
